verdict.answer_first: B states the likely cause immediately: "Most likely: your access tokens have a short expiry... and the refresh path isn't actually working"; A opens with "one of two distinct failure shapes."
verdict.decisiveness: B commits to a primary diagnosis with "Most likely" and labels the alternative "A close second"; A frames it as "almost always one of two" without picking one first.
verdict.actionability: B is easier to act on right now: decode token, compare "exp − iat", then check instance count/secret source and restart clustering; A is also actionable but more sprawling.
